description: This file defines negative question formation in the Future Continuous tense in Njo Viri (Balanda). Future continuous negative questions ask whether an action will not be ongoing at a future time.

general_principle.statement: Future continuous negative questions in Balanda are formed by retaining the future continuous structure, adding the negation marker 'gba', and placing the question marker 'we?' sentence-finally.

negative_question_structure.structure: Subject + le-dho + ti-Verb + (Object / Complement) + gba + we?
constraints: The future marker 'le-' must attach to 'dho'
The progressive prefix 'ti-' must be present
The negation marker 'gba' must appear before 'we?'
The question marker 'we?' must be sentence-final

tense_and_aspect_distinction.rule: Future continuous negative questions encode both future tense and progressive aspect.

error_constraints: Do not use the result marker 'dheki'
Do not move 'gba' or 'we?' from their fixed positions

balanda: Ne ledho tija se gba we?
english: Will I not be eating fish?

balanda: Ni ledho tinzü ngo gba we?
english: Will she not be drinking water?

balanda: Danda ledho titeli muru famvara gba we?
english: Will we not be sleeping on the bed?

balanda: Uku ledho tiyai gba we?
english: Will Uku not be going?

balanda: Ngande ledho tidhii ba gba we?
english: Will Ngande not be coming home?

balanda: Ndi ledho tinonö gbi difo gba we?
english: Will they not be walking in the compound?

balanda: Ni ledho tinangele zanga gba we?
english: Will she not be running fast?

balanda: Uku ledho timande gbi njü gba we?
english: Will Uku not be working in the garden?

balanda: Wiki ledho timoliki gbi difo gba we?
english: Will the child not be playing in the compound?

balanda: Ne ledho tiloro voro gba we?
english: Will I not be watching the dog?

balanda: Ne ledho tivele njo balanda gba we?
english: Will I not be speaking Balanda?

balanda: Wilii ledho tisudi kavoso gba we?
english: Will the girl not be writing words?

balanda: Ne ledho tidheke kitabu gba we?
english: Will I not be reading a book?

balanda: Ni ledho titeri ay gba we?
english: Will he not be thinking about it?

balanda: Ndi ledho tiŋiyi ay gba we?
english: Will they not be knowing it?

balanda: Ne ledho tiwe ndi gba we?
english: Will I not be asking them?

balanda: Ngande ledho tivele zi ndi gba we?
english: Will Ngande not be telling them?

balanda: Wilii ledho tikeye ti naa ni gba we?
english: Will the girl not be calling her mother?

balanda: Ne ledho timerego ŋo gba we?
english: Will I not be loving you?

balanda: Ni ledho timaguku ti kpörö gba we?
english: Will he not be fearing the snake?

balanda: Ni ledho tisogo ni gba we?
english: Will she not be hating him?

balanda: Ngande ledho tiriki ni gba we?
english: Will Ngande not be surprising him?

balanda: Ni ledho tidovee kurru gba we?
english: Will he not be seeming calm?

balanda: Wilii ledho tiyele tamma gba we?
english: Will the girl not be tying the shoe?

balanda: Ni ledho tidi kalla gba we?
english: Will he not be cutting the pot?

balanda: Ne ledho titele njokoji gba we?
english: Will I not be pulling the door?

balanda: Danda ledho tituru songo gba we?
english: Will we not be pushing the box?

balanda: Wilii ledho tisoko tamma gba we?
english: Will the girl not be washing the shoe?

balanda: Ne ledho tikuru kavokau gba we?
english: Will I not be hiding the beads?

balanda: Ngande ledho tingö tiyi gba we?
english: Will Ngande not be building a house?

balanda: Ne ledho tisuru kavoso gba we?
english: Will I not be creating words?

balanda: Ni ledho tigiri kavoso gba we?
english: Will she not be changing the words?

balanda: Ne ledho tikara njokoji gba we?
english: Will I not be turning the door?

balanda: Danda ledho titoko villi gba we?
english: Will we not be adding money?

balanda: Ne ledho tikefo Balanda gba we?
english: Will I not be describing Balanda?

balanda: Ndi ledho tikonu nvesani gba we?
english: Will they not be helping the poor?

balanda: Ngande ledho tindugu mira gba we?
english: Will Ngande not be initiating the project?

balanda: Ne ledho timaforo mira gba we?
english: Will I not be contributing to the project?

balanda: Wilii ledho tisarwa kumere gba we?
english: Will the girl not be separating trash?

balanda: Danda ledho tikiri tidina gba we?
english: Will we not be upholding the law?

balanda: Ne ledho tiduru ngo gba we?
english: Will I not be wanting water?

balanda: Ni ledho tize villi gba we?
english: Will she not be giving money?

balanda: Ne ledho tidhe villi gba we?
english: Will I not be finding money?

balanda: Uku ledho timele vongu gba we?
english: Will Uku not be trying the cloth?

balanda: Ngande ledho tisi ba gba we?
english: Will Ngande not be leaving home?

balanda: Ne ledho tilu Wau gba we?
english: Will I not be arriving in Wau?

balanda: Ni ledho tifagi mva gba we?
english: Will he not be sharpening the knife?

balanda: Ngande ledho tidewe kakpodu gba we?
english: Will Ngande not be imitating adults?

balanda: Danda ledho tibita mira gba we?
english: Will we not be starting the project?

balanda: Ni ledho titeta gba we?
english: Will he not be falling?
